documents.title: Node.js API Documentation

instructions.addingDocuments: Place resources in appropriate subdirectories. Update this index.json with document metadata including title, author, description, license, topics, and relevance.
instructions.downloadingSources: Download from official Node.js documentation at nodejs.org/api. Prioritize official Node.js documentation.
instructions.namingConvention: Use clear, descriptive filenames with underscores: api_name.html, pattern_name.md
instructions.licenseCompliance: Include license information for all resources. Prioritize official Node.js documentation.
instructions.nodejsFocus: Resources should enable SWEObeyMe to: (1) understand Node.js API, (2) implement event loop correctly, (3) use streams properly, (4) handle buffers correctly, (5) implement async patterns.
